message:
feat(notifications): implement comprehensive notification system

Adds a multi-channel notification system with:
- Notification model with priorities, categories, and actions
- NotificationService with channel routing logic
- User preferences with quiet hours and per-category settings
- REST API endpoints for notifications and preferences
- 21 unit tests covering service and routes

Channels implemented:
- in_app: Full implementation with storage
- email/slack/webhook: Stubs ready for integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
